mapper.sql: special_id , topci_id,topci_name, special_name, species_id, trial_id, color_type, indicator_id, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: select count(0) from sys_user su left join sys_user_role sur on su.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role sr on sur.role_id = sr.role_id where su.del_flag = '0' and sr.del_flag = '0' and sr.role_level = 1 and su.user_id=#{userId}
